stemHtml:
Determine the length of the MAC, given:

Leading edge at wing root: STA 235
Trailing edge at wing root: STA 250
Leading edge at wing tip: STA 148
Trailing edge at wing tip: STA 212
Leading edge of MAC: STA 192
Trailing edge of MAC: STA 224

Note: Body stations are distances from the aircraft nose in 10-1 m.
